languages.text: {n}Звучит, будто он не просто верит — он либо сталкивался, либо был на грани столновения с мифическими ксеносами.{/n}
{n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Звучит, будто он не просто верит — он либо сталкивался, либо был на грани столновения с мифическими ксеносами.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Esto parece más que una creencia: o se ha encontrado con estos xenos míticos o ha estado muy cerca de hacerlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Esto parece más que una creencia: o se ha encontrado con estos xenos míticos o ha estado muy cerca de hacerlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这听起来不像是单纯的猜测——他接触过这些传说中的异形，或者至少非常接近。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这听起来不像是单纯的猜测——他接触过这些传说中的异形，或者至少非常接近。{/n}

languages.text: {n}C'est plus qu'une simple croyance : il a croisé la route de ces xénos de légende, ou presque.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}C'est plus qu'une simple croyance : il a croisé la route de ces xénos de légende, ou presque.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Er scheint das nicht nur zu glauben — offenbar ist er diesen mythischen Xenos begegnet oder stand kurz davor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Er scheint das nicht nur zu glauben — offenbar ist er diesen mythischen Xenos begegnet oder stand kurz davor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼は神話に登場する異星人と遭遇したことがあるか、あるいはその寸前まで行ったことがあるのだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This sounds like more than a belief — he has encountered these mythical xenos, or come very close to doing so.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sözlerinde inanmaktan çok daha fazlası var. Bu efsanevi zenolarla karşılaşmış veya onlarla karşılaşmaya çok yaklaşmış.{/n}
